fields.label: Section
fields.description: Statutory section the finding cites (compliance rules).

fields.label: Disclaimer
fields.description: Statutory disclaimer carried verbatim from the rule pack (shown alongside the finding, never paraphrased).

fields.label: Company
fields.description: The company scope this finding was detected under (A16). Stamped at insert so a Company-B run never auto-resolves a Company-A finding; empty legacy rows are exempt until re-seen.

fields.label: Fingerprint
fields.description: Stable hash of rule_id + ref_doctype + ref_name. Dedupes a recurring finding across runs (new vs recurring vs resolved).

fields.label: Result Class
fields.description: PP-1 four-class value grammar. Set once at writeback, never editable afterwards (controller set-once guard). observed_fact = direct record read; derived_candidate = a candidate until confirmed; legal_scenario = a rule scenario, never realised exposure; confirmed_outcome is RESERVED — an evaluator may not emit it (written only by the PP-5 provenance ledger).

fields.label: Confidence
fields.description: derived_candidate only — the match/estimate confidence.

fields.label: Match Basis
fields.description: derived_candidate only — how the candidate was matched (e.g. '2B-match', 'fuzzy vendor').

fields.label: False Positive Path
fields.description: derived_candidate only — how a false positive would present, so a reviewer can rule it out.

fields.label: Confirmation Status
fields.description: derived_candidate lifecycle. Unconfirmed at writeback; only the PP-5 provenance ledger may move it off unconfirmed.

fields.label: Rule Version
fields.description: legal_scenario only — the version of the statutory rule set applied.

fields.label: Assumptions
fields.description: legal_scenario only — the assumptions the scenario rests on.

fields.label: Known Exceptions
fields.description: legal_scenario only — documented carve-outs / exceptions to the rule.

fields.label: Source
fields.description: legal_scenario only — the authoritative reference for the rule.

fields.label: Reviewer
fields.description: legal_scenario only — the named reviewer of record.

fields.label: Outcome Provenance
fields.description: PP-5 — required iff result_class == confirmed_outcome, empty for every other class. Set ONLY by the provenance ledger when a transaction_posted / finding_resolved(human) event closes the loop; also moves confirmation_status to confirmed.

fields.label: Resolved By
fields.description: PP-5 finding review provenance — the user who resolved this finding (human resolves only).

fields.label: Resolved At
fields.description: PP-5 finding review provenance — when the finding was resolved (human OR automatic).

fields.label: Resolution Kind
fields.description: PP-5 — separates human resolution from automatic. A16 coverage auto-resolve stamps auto_coverage; a watermark-gated auto-resolve stamps auto_watermark; a person stamps human.

fields.label: Result Link DocType
fields.description: PP-5 — the resulting transaction/draft CREATED from acting on this finding (distinct from the flagged ref_doctype/ref_name).

fields.label: Result Link Name
fields.description: PP-5 — the name of the resulting transaction/draft created from acting on this finding.
